title: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow][/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...
conditions: All players must have at least 19 HP
notes:
This is a multi-stage event with three decision points. Each time you choose to Reach Deeper, you take damage and advance to the next stage with a new Extract Nectar option offering higher gold.

[gold]Stage 1 (Initial):[/gold]
• Extract Nectar: Gain 35 Gold, end event
• Reach Deeper: Lose 5 HP, advance to Stage 2

[gold]Stage 2:[/gold]
• Extract Nectar: Gain 75 Gold, end event
• Reach Deeper: Lose 6 HP, advance to Stage 3

[gold]Stage 3 (Final):[/gold]
• Extract Nectar: Gain 135 Gold, end event
• Enter the Center: Lose 7 HP, obtain [aqua]Pollinous Core[/aqua] relic, end event

The event progression text emphasizes the danger: the flower's toxins numb your pain as you go deeper, but the pile of bones suggests others who went too far. Maximum total damage is 18 HP (5 + 6 + 7), and the spawn condition ensures all players have at least 19 HP—enough to guarantee survival regardless of choices.
